channel.title: Sports
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Sports, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: How To Bet This Week in College Hoops: Arizona-Houston, Michigan-Duke, More
item.description: Check out what to know about the best games from this week's men's college basketball slate.

item.title: How To Bet This Week in the NBA: Pistons-Knicks, Celtics-Lakers, More
item.description: Check out what to know about the best games from this week's NBA slate, including Pistons-Knicks and Celtics-Lakers.

item.title: 2026 Men's Final Four Odds: Michigan, Arizona Lead the Way
item.description: The Final Four is creeping closer. Check out the early odds for which teams will make up the prestigious grouping come season's end.

item.title: 2026 NFL Offseason Buzz, Rumors: Chiefs Restructure Patrick Mahomes' Contract
item.description: Here's the latest offseason buzz and rumors around the NFL.

item.title: 2026 NFL Draft No. 2 Pick Odds: Arvell Reese Favored, Ty Simpson Longshot
item.description: Fernando Mendoza is the clear favorite to go No. 1 in the 2026 NFL Draft, but what about No. 2? Here are the latest odds.

item.title: Klaebo joins Phelps as only 10-gold Olympians
item.description: Norway's Johannes Hoesflot Klaebo won a 10th gold medal in cross country skiing, putting him in an exclusive group with swimming great Michael Phelps.

item.title: Rousey vs. Carano is a sign of the times -- with a silver lining
item.description: Ronda Rousey vs. Gina Carano is an opportunity for two pioneers of women's MMA to have a night in the spotlight they created.

item.title: UCLA's Cronin ejects own player after flagrant foul
item.description: UCLA coach Mick Cronin sent Bruins center Steven Jamerson II to the locker room after he fouled Carson Cooper from behind on a dunk attempt late in Tu...

item.title: Shiffrin ends Olympic drought with slalom gold
item.description: Mikaela Shiffrin put in two dominant runs to win the Olympic women's slalom by 1.50 seconds and end a wait for another medal that stretched back to 20...

item.title: KC reworks Mahomes deal for massive cap room
item.description: The Chiefs restructured Patrick Mahomes' contract this week, creating much-needed salary cap space ahead of the 2026 season, according to ESPN and mul...
